verdicts.name: Nõo vald
verdicts.explanation: noo.ee belongs to Nõo Lihatööstus (meat factory). The municipality's actual domain is nvv.ee (confirmed: website at nvv.ee shows municipal content, email is vald@nvv.ee). The seed domain nvald.ee has no MX records, so the pipeline guessed noo.ee which has Microsoft MX — but that's the meat company's M365 tenant, not the municipality.
verdicts.action: Fix seed data domain to nvv.ee

verdicts.name: Hiiumaa vald
verdicts.explanation: hiiumaa.ee is a tourism portal website BUT the municipality uses hiiumaa.ee for email. MX record (hiiumaa-ee.h-v1.mx.microsoft) confirms Microsoft 365 on this domain. Municipal admin site is at vald.hiiumaa.ee (subdomain). Email domain is correct.
verdicts.action: No change needed. Remove from KNOWN_CORPORATE_DOMAINS.

verdicts.name: Alytaus rajono savivaldybė
verdicts.explanation: arsa.lt is the official abbreviation for Alytaus Rajono Savivaldybės Administracija. Confirmed: www.arsa.lt shows municipality content, contact email is info@arsa.lt. Low similarity score is expected — Lithuanian municipalities use abbreviations.
verdicts.action: No change needed. Pattern: Lithuanian rajono municipalities use abbreviations.

verdicts.name: Kauno rajono savivaldybė
verdicts.explanation: krs.lt = Kauno Rajono Savivaldybė abbreviation. Website was unreachable during fetch but domain pattern matches the Lithuanian abbreviation convention (same as arsa.lt, panrs.lt, vrsa.lt). Has Microsoft MX.
verdicts.action: No change needed but verify website accessibility.
evidence: Microsoft MX confirms active email domain
Abbreviation pattern matches other LT rajono municipalities

verdicts.name: Panevėžio rajono savivaldybė
verdicts.explanation: panrs.lt = Panevėžio Rajono Savivaldybė abbreviation. Seed domain was panevezys-r.lt (no MX), pipeline found panrs.lt. Website unreachable but domain pattern matches Lithuanian convention. Has local-isp provider.

verdicts.name: Vilniaus rajono savivaldybė
verdicts.explanation: vrsa.lt = Vilniaus Rajono Savivaldybės Administracija. Confirmed: website shows 'Vilniaus rajono savivaldybė' content with municipal governance information. Microsoft MX.

verdicts.name: Dienvidkurzemes novads
verdicts.explanation: dkn.lv = Dienvidkurzemes Novads abbreviation. Confirmed: www.dkn.lv is the official municipality website. Contact email is pasts@dkn.lv. Changed from seed domain dienvidkurzeme.lv. Microsoft MX.

corrections_needed.fix: Change seed domain from nvald.ee to nvv.ee

patterns_discovered: Lithuanian rajono municipalities consistently use abbreviations (arsa, krs, panrs, vrsa) — low name-similarity is expected, not suspicious
Latvian novads municipalities use short abbreviations (dkn) — same pattern
Estonian hiiumaa.ee: tourism portal website but municipal email domain — website ≠ email domain
